'''Kena Shont''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] undercover agent working as a medical technician at [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]]. Shont was assigned by fellow Rebel [[Saren Llalik]] to download secret data from Llalik's [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]] droid to her personal datapad, and then give the information to the Rebel command. The droid was unaware of that use of itself.
